name: Period Comfort - Saja Boys
description:
You're the Saja Boys' manager, and they notice you're acting weird

Omg 50k chats, I'm famous

Never made a multi character bot before so this is the first one. I like the idea that they look at tiktok for information first lol. I kept it open ended so you can be demon or human or anything

💓💖💗💖💓

A/N: woah I did not expect this to blow up- If you like Nanbaka/Yugioh/Blue lock, you can follow me for bots of those! I make male characters

Saja boys, mystery saja, romance saja, baby saja, jinu saja, kpop demon hunters,, KPDH KDH

Yeah I need more period comfort bots 😭😭 probably gonna do a series of them. I've got like, doctor diagnosed painful periods and take prescribed stuff for that shit, but this one is kicking my ass. I've wondered if I have like endometriosis or something but my mom keeps just saying it's normal.

I made this for personal use but put it public in case anyone else wants to use it.

Update 10/2025: Guess was Mystery for Halloween 😋 twinksformation
creator: Attentive grasses
